About Me

I'm Abdulla Daabal, a Bachelor's graduate in International Logistics Management from Bahrain Polytechnic (GPA 3.67), awarded the Logistics Program Ambassador title. I bring hands-on experience across cargo operations, procurement, and supply chain analysis — backed by training at Bahrain Airport Services, Arab Financial Services, and Addax BSC.

Beyond the workplace, I've led community initiatives, co-organised the NASA Space Apps 2025 hackathon, served as Financial Treasurer at the BP Volunteers Club, and proofread and managed the launch of the award-winning "Green PMO" book. I'm passionate about operations, data-driven problem solving, and building things that matter in Bahrain and beyond.

Arabic (Fluent)  ·  English (Fluent)

LinkedIn
Projects
Cold Chain Process Improvement — BAS
Led a cold chain project at Bahrain Airport Services analysing workflow inefficiencies. Discovered a +2.55°C mean temperature excursion. Proposed a two-pillar strategy: a PER Rapid Response Team and CHL Optimisation via automated shutters and air curtains.
Mixed Methods · Temperature Logging · Pearson · Welch ANOVA · Kaplan-Meier
DOC: Full Report ↗ PDF: Slides ↗
Classic Car Logistics — Arthur Bechtel
Full logistics and project management plan for transporting high-value classic cars from Stuttgart to Bahrain International Circuit for the F1 Grand Prix Classic Car Show.
WBS · PESTLE · Kübler-Ross · Risk Analysis · Transport Logistics
DOC: Assignment ↗ DOC: Reflection ↗
Khalifa Bin Salman Port — Strategic Analysis
Comprehensive SWOT analysis and competitive benchmarking of Khalifa Bin Salman Port, evaluating its positioning against regional ports and identifying growth opportunities.
Port Operations · SWOT · Maritime Logistics · Supply Chain Strategy
Carrefour Bahrain — SCOR Model Analysis
Critical analysis of Carrefour's retail supply chain strategy in Bahrain and the Middle East using the Supply Chain Operations Reference (SCOR) Model.
SCOR Model · Retail Supply Chain · Market Analysis · Strategic Management
Transport Communications — Bus Service NETS Analysis
Analysed a public bus service's transport and communication systems applying NETS analysis and Transport Communications theories, with a comparative resilience study.
NETS Analysis · Transport Communications Theory · Systems Thinking
DOC: Assignment 1 ↗
Hong Kong Public Transit — Smart Mobility
Analysed Hong Kong's multi-modal transit system (MTR, tramways, TIHL buses), evaluating the Octopus Card, real-time info systems, and applying NETS theory to communication resilience.
NETS Theory · Smart Transit · Real-Time Info Systems · Urban Mobility

Digital Twins in the Supply Chain: Breakthrough Results or Just Industry Hype?
A review of 10 empirical studies reveals a striking gap between headline results from Amazon, Pfizer and Toyota — and the average firm's reality. Only 16% of companies have achieved a true closed-loop Digital Twin. This post breaks down what separates the leaders from the laggards.
